faqs.question: What is the SML Leviathan Matrix API?
faqs.answer: The SML Leviathan Matrix is a real-time equity intelligence API built for AI agents and institutional traders. It provides short-squeeze detection, regime analysis, and momentum signals for US equities. Agents pay USDC on Base via the x402 protocol — no API keys or human sign-up required.

faqs.question: How do AI agents pay for market data?
faqs.answer: Agents pay USDC on Base (or Polygon/Solana) using the x402 protocol. For per-call access, each HTTP call includes the payment. For subscription access, the agent pays $250 or $1000 USDC upfront and receives a 30-day bearer JWT token for authenticated endpoints. No human sign-up or API key is required — fully autonomous agent flow.

faqs.question: What signal types does the API provide?
faqs.answer: Four endpoints: /signal/:ticker/teaser (free) returns bias only. /signal/:ticker ($0.01 USDC) returns bias, momentum, and a 0-100 composite score. /regime/:ticker ($0.05 USDC) returns full multi-factor regime analysis. /squeeze/:ticker ($0.25 USDC) is the short-squeeze pressure engine — the core differentiator that crypto-only rivals don't offer.

faqs.question: What are the subscription tiers and prices?
faqs.answer: Shadow (free): 65-minute delayed data at /matrix/:feed/delayed, no auth required, ideal for backtesting. Standard ($250 USDC/30 days): real-time feed via bearer token after x402 payment. VIP ($1000 USDC/30 days): zero-hop priority data at the lowest possible latency.

faqs.question: How do I verify that API responses are authentic?
faqs.answer: Every paid response is Ed25519-signed. The public key is available at GET /. Each response includes {payload, signature} fields. Verify the signature against the public key before trusting any data — this guarantees the payload came from ScriptMasterLabs and was not tampered with in transit.

faqs.question: Does the API support the AP2 Google Agent Payments Protocol?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Leviathan Matrix verifies AP2 mandates in optional mode by default. Send an X-AP2-MANDATE header with a base64-encoded W3C VC bundle on any payment route. AP2_MODE can be configured as 'off', 'optional' (default), or 'required'. Spec: https://ap2-protocol.org/specification/

faqs.question: Is there an affiliate program?
faqs.answer: Yes — 30% USDC revenue-share on every referred paid call. Add ?aff=0x<wallet> to any paid call URL, or send the X-Affiliate-ID: 0x<wallet> header. Affiliate earnings are settled in USDC on Base. Check affiliate status at GET /affiliate/:wallet.

faqs.question: How does the loyalty program work?
faqs.answer: Each paid call accrues loyalty credits. Tiers run Bronze → Silver → Gold → Platinum; higher tiers earn more credits per call. Redeem credits for free calls via POST /redeem (requires a signed message from the paying wallet). Check loyalty tier and credit balance at GET /loyalty/:wallet.

faqs.question: Which blockchains are supported for payment?
faqs.answer: Base is the primary chain (lowest fees, same 0x wallet). Polygon is also supported via /poly/ prefix routes (e.g., /poly/matrix/subscribe/standard). Solana is supported via /sol/ prefix routes. All EVM chains (Base, Polygon) use the same wallet address: 0x4e14B249D9A4c9c9352D780eCEB508A8eB7a7700.

faqs.question: Does the API support TradingView webhooks?
faqs.answer: Yes. POST TradingView alerts to /webhook/tv or /api/tv/:feed/webhook. Set the TV_WEBHOOK_SECRET environment variable to validate incoming webhook signatures. Each webhook triggers a Leviathan Snap broadcast and an optional Discord alert.

faqs.question: Is there cold-start latency on the API?
faqs.answer: No. The Leviathan Matrix runs on Render Starter (always-on paid tier) — not the free tier. Render free-tier services sleep after 15 minutes of inactivity and cold-start in 30-60 seconds. The Leviathan Matrix is always running with zero cold-start latency.

faqs.question: Who built the Leviathan Matrix and what is ScriptMasterLabs?
faqs.answer: ScriptMasterLabs (SML) is a Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) building sovereign AI infrastructure. The Leviathan Matrix is one of several production products in the SML ecosystem, alongside SqueezeOS (market intelligence MCP server), Ghost Layer (XRP/Base toll gateway), TrustVerify AI (enterprise AI vendor trust scoring), and 402Proof (x402 payment firewall). Contact: scriptmasterlabs@gmail.com
